identity.headline: Compassionate, evidence-based therapy for {{clientDescription}}.
identity.corePromise: Provide a safe, structured path toward relief, resilience, and long-term emotional health.

bookingTypes.title: Consultation Call
bookingTypes.description: A short consultation to discuss fit, goals, and next steps.

bookingTypes.title: Initial Assessment Session
bookingTypes.description: Comprehensive intake session to build your personalized care plan.

fields.label: What brings you in right now?
What would progress look like for you?

emailTemplates.name: Intake Received
emailTemplates.subject: We received your intake — here’s what happens next

emailTemplates.name: Session Reminder
emailTemplates.subject: Reminder: your upcoming session
emailTemplates.bodyText:
Hi {{contactSingular}},

A gentle reminder that your session is scheduled for {{sessionDate}} at {{sessionTime}}.

If you need to reschedule, please use your booking link at least 24 hours in advance.

See you soon,
{{businessName}}

emailTemplates.name: Care Plan Follow-up
emailTemplates.subject: Your personalized care plan
emailTemplates.bodyText:
Hi {{contactSingular}},

Thank you for your openness in session. Based on what we discussed, I prepared a care plan with practical next steps and session cadence recommendations.

Reply with any questions and we can adjust together.

Warmly,
{{businessName}}

sections.heading: Current Challenges
sections.body: Summary of presenting concerns and current stress patterns from intake and assessment.

sections.heading: Therapeutic Goals
sections.body: Clear, measurable goals we will track together over the next 8-12 weeks.

sections.heading: Care Structure
sections.body: Recommended frequency, modality, and therapeutic approach tailored to your needs.

sections.heading: Investment
sections.body: Session fee: {{sessionFee}}. Superbill and payment options available.

content.headline: Feel more grounded, clear, and emotionally supported
content.subheadline: {{businessName}} provides compassionate care for {{clientDescription}} through practical, evidence-based therapy.

personas.name: Anxious professionals
personas.description: You’re high-functioning on the outside but exhausted internally.

personas.name: Relationship strain
personas.description: You want healthier communication, boundaries, and emotional connection.

personas.name: Life transition support
personas.description: You’re navigating change and need stable guidance and tools.

content.headline: What therapy can help you build

benefits.title: Emotional Clarity
benefits.description: Understand patterns and respond with intention instead of reactivity.

benefits.title: Practical Tools
benefits.description: Leave sessions with concrete strategies you can use the same week.

benefits.title: Sustainable Change
benefits.description: Create habits and boundaries that support long-term mental wellness.

faqs.question: Do you offer virtual sessions?
faqs.answer: Yes, secure telehealth sessions are available for clients who prefer remote care.

faqs.question: How often do we meet?
faqs.answer: Most clients begin weekly, then taper as stability and progress increase.

faqs.question: What if I’m unsure therapy is right for me?
faqs.answer: That’s exactly what the consultation call is for — to assess fit and answer your questions.

content.headline: Take the first step, gently
content.body: Book a consultation to talk through what support could look like for you.
